case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. AHMED MOHAMED ELATIWY ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 56522361) FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 DAYS

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-04-2015 CONTINUED TO MAY-06-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-16-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-06-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
